'''Yin Fire Rooster''' is the 34th of the sixty nodes of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Divine Sixty]], the great cycle that the [[Heavenly stems|heavenly stems]] and [[Earthly Branches|earthly branches]] trace across the ringworld's calendar of [[Gaia]] and [[Luna]].

Its stem is 丁 Hinoto (yin fire, the luna-aligned face of summer), and its branch is 酉 Tori, the [[Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster]] hour. Within the [[Wuxing]] reading of the node, the stem's fire overcomes the branch's metal, a relationship of restraint.

On the [[The divine 60|Divine Sixty]] lattice this position falls between [[Yang Fire Monkey]] (node 33) and [[Yang Earth Dog]] (node 35).

== Stem and branch ==
* '''Stem:''' [[Hinoto (丁)]] — yin fire
* '''Branch:''' [[Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster (酉)]] — yin metal
* '''Celestial body:''' [[Luna]]
* '''Element-season:''' summer

== See also ==
* [[The divine 60]]
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]
* [[Yang Fire Monkey]] — preceding node
* [[Yang Earth Dog]] — following node

{{wikidata link|Q201551}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Ringworld]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
